name: Emily
tagline: Creative, nature-loving UGC — airy visuals, real personality, content that feels like you already know me.

about.headline: About Me
paragraphs: Hi, I'm Emily — a UGC creator who turns everyday moments into scroll-stopping content. I specialize in warm, relatable storytelling that helps brands connect with real people.
My work is organic, aesthetic, and a little whimsical: plants on the desk, golden-hour light, handwritten notes in frame. I want viewers to feel your brand and meet the human behind the camera — me.
Based in the DC area, I love collaborating with wellness, lifestyle, and purpose-driven brands that care about authenticity as much as aesthetics.

photos.caption: Emily on a nature walk — where ideas bloom
Emily filming UGC — behind the scenes

contact.headline: Let's Create Together
contact.body: Want content that converts and a creator brands actually want to work with again? Hi — I'm Emily. Let's chat.

services.title: TikTok & Reels
services.description: Short-form vertical video with strong hooks, trending audio, and that effortless Emily energy brands remember.

services.title: Instagram Content
services.description: Static posts, carousels, and Stories with an airy, nature-driven look that still converts.

services.title: Testimonials
services.description: Talking-head UGC that builds trust — warm, honest, and unmistakably me on camera.

services.title: Unboxing & Demos
services.description: Product-first content with creative girl charm — polished enough for ads, real enough to relate.
